## Concept / rationale receipts
- **Widget domain concept** (`specs/900-widget/spec.md`) — A widget is a named, soft-deletable unit the catalog service exposes to callers.
- **D1: Widgets use soft-delete, never hard-delete** (`docs/90-DECISIONS-AND-IDEAS.md`) — Soft-delete keeps audit history queryable; hard-delete was rejected for compliance reasons. (`rationale_for` → Widget domain concept)
